message.content: The screen is a Sana AI login page with a clean, two-column layout. Left: white background with a logo, navigation (Overview, Pricing, etc.), a "Welcome to Sana" headline, subhead "Your AI agent for work," sign-in prompt, a Google sign-in button ("Lanjutkan dengan Google"), an email input field (pre-filled: alexsmith@content-mobbin.com), a dark "Continue" button, and legal text. Right: a dark-themed laptop mockup showing the Sana interface (bright yellow task card, dark UI elements). Colors: white (background), dark gray/black (buttons, footer), bright yellow (task card), gray (text). Interactions: clicking the Google button, entering email, tapping Continue. Footer: "Sana AI" logo and "curated by Mobbin" text.
